functions.test_requirement: Cover request-side AI matching lookup plus matching pipeline behavior for quota handling, tech-stack mapping, empty-result handling, AI-disabled fallback, and AI-enabled shortlist ranking.

preconditions: The request techPreferences string is React, NestJS, FinTech
returns: Checks the AI_MATCH_SEARCH quota for client-1 before matching
Builds broker matching input with requiredTechStack React, NestJS, FinTech
Increments AI_MATCH_SEARCH usage with candidatesFound after the search succeeds

preconditions: The request techPreferences field is an empty string
returns: Builds broker matching input with an empty requiredTechStack list
Skips AI_MATCH_SEARCH quota check and usage tracking
Returns the matching results without caller-specific quota accounting

preconditions: Hard filter finds no eligible candidates for req-1
returns: Does not call the tag scorer or AI ranker when no candidate passes hard filter

preconditions: Hard filter returns 1 eligible broker candidate
AI matching is disabled for this search
returns: Classifies the full deterministic candidate pool
Returns aiRelevanceScore null with fallback reasoning that AI analysis was not enabled

preconditions: Hard filter returns 12 eligible freelancer candidates
AI matching is enabled for this search
returns: Ranks a wider AI shortlist before final trimming
Returns only the top 2 candidates after classification
